title: dovvnloading/Graphlink
summary: Graphlink (formerly Graphite) is a local-first, graph-based AI workspace for building branching reasoning workflows, running agent plugins, and orchestrating multiple AI providers in a visual environment designed for complex problem solving.

summary: Top Autonomous Multi-Agent Dialogue Systems for AI Character Emergence (2026)

title: ismayc/AllKlaro
summary: 🗣️ Live, fully-local speech translation between German, English, and Spanish — Whisper + Silero VAD + Ollama on Apple Silicon

title: vulture-s/arkiv
summary: Local-first media asset manager with AI semantic search — reads pro-camera metadata (Sony XAVC sidecar, FX-series) and 360 footage (Insta360/GoPro Max) that consumer DAMs drop. FFmpeg + ChromaDB + local LLM.

title: pavanbadempet/AI-Healthcare-System
summary: Privacy-first AI Healthcare platform for HIPAA-compliant clinical workflows. Features a stateful LangGraph & MAF multi-agent RAG system, local Ollama LLMs, FastAPI, and React. Integrates PySpark Medallion Lakehouse analytics, HAPI FHIR patient imports, medical diagnostics ML models, and secure EHR hospital operations.

title: arn0ld87/agora
summary: Self-hosted GraphRAG + multi-agent social-media simulator. Upload a doc → build a knowledge graph → spawn persona-driven agents → generate a report. Ollama & Neo4j instead of Cloud-APIs. DACH-first. Lokaler Multi-Agent-Social-Media-Simulator mit GraphRAG-Pipeline. Dokument hoch, Knowledge-Graph bauen, Personas spawnen, Report raus. Ollama + Neo4j

title: Danyalkhattak/Xirea-Desktop
summary: Official desktop version of Xirea built with Tauri, React, and TypeScript.

title: psancheti6666/sotto
summary: Private, local dictation for macOS & Linux — hold a key, speak, and clean punctuated text lands at your cursor. 100% offline: on-device speech recognition + LLM cleanup, $0 to run.

title: hhagenbuch/castaway
summary: Agent runtime for disconnected environments: local-model failover, deferred side-effects with revalidation, offline-aware evals

title: ZeroDot1/LLMWikiNG
summary: LLMWikiNG is a local, privacy-friendly wiki platform developed by ZeroDot1 and based on the Karpathy LLM Wiki Pattern. The wiki is maintained and expanded by AI assistants—and you can easily read, search, and manage it right in your browser.

title: tobocop2/lilbee
summary: The whole local AI stack in one executable: it runs and manages local AI models across every GPU, and it's a search engine you can talk to, with cited answers from your files, code, and the web. MCP server for coding agents, web crawler, TUI, CLI, REST API, Python library. No Ollama or LM Studio needed, works with both.

title: terrella-project/terrella
summary: Terrella — a homelab-scale personal AI stack: local models, multi-provider gateway, cost ledger, observability. CLI lands at M1.

title: ricardozmt/claude-in-your-pocket
summary: OpenClaude 2026: AI Coding Agent in Your Pocket – No Server, No PC

title: TaeSooPark-PTS/LatticeAI
summary: Local-first private AI memory layer / Digital Brain for conversations, documents, decisions, and model-agnostic knowledge.

title: richhabits/sam
summary: A free, private, local-first AI assistant that actually does the work — 167 tools, a team of 78 AI agents, 40 rotating free AI brains, 25 skills. Not a chatbot, a doer. It doesn't just answer — it handles it.

title: juninmd/tokenix
summary: Local semantic search, symbol graphs, secrets scanning, output filters, and CLI hooks that save 60-90% LLM tokens.
